    updateAnswer(Answer) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates an answers information (Content, id, answeredBy).
    updateAnswerHasReview(Boolean, int) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates an answer to show if it has a review
    updateDatabaseSchema() - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the database schema.
    updateHasRequest(String, Boolean) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the value of hasRequest.
    updateQuestion(Question) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates a questions information (Title, content, id, and askedBy).
    updateUserEmail(String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates a user's email in the database.
    updateUserMiddleInitial(String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the middle initial of a user in the database.
    updateUserPassword(String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the password of a user in the database.
    updateUserRole(String, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the role of a user in the database.
    upvoteAnswer(int, String) - Method in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
    Updates the upvotes for an answer.
    upvotes - Variable in class application.Answer
     
    user - Variable in class application.UserDatabaseUI
     
    User - Class in application
    The User class represents a user entity in the system.
    User(String, String, String) - Constructor for class application.User
    Constructor for minimal user creation
    User(String, String, String, String, String, int, boolean, String) - Constructor for class application.User
    Constructor for user list creation.
    User(String, String, String, String, String, String, String, int) - Constructor for class application.User
    Constructor for full user creation.
    USER - Static variable in class databasePart1.DatabaseHelper
     
    UserDatabaseUI - Class in application
    UserDatabasePage class represents the user interface for the user database.
